name: synapse-kg
description: Connect Claude to your Synapse knowledge graph. Search, create, and analyze entities, relationships, and notes with graph intelligence.

vault_path.title: Vault Path
vault_path.description: Path to your Synapse vault (the folder containing .synapse/graph.db)

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search entities, notes, and sources with relevance scoring

tools.name: get_entity
tools.description: Get complete entity details: properties, relationships, aliases, tags

tools.name: get_neighbors
tools.description: Traverse the graph from a starting entity

tools.name: merge_entities
tools.description: Merge duplicate entities with edge transfer

tools.name: manage_note
tools.description: Read, create, or update markdown notes

tools.name: analyze_graph
tools.description: Graph intelligence: overview, health, centrality, orphans, paths
